title: Hyper-V Provider Config
description: Schema for provider.config when provider.type is "hyperv". The boxy agent must run on the Hyper-V host as Administrator.

template_vhd.description: Path to the parent VHD/VHDX used as a base for differencing disks (required).

vhd_dir.description: Directory where differencing VHDs are created. Defaults to the directory containing template_vhd.

switch.description: Name of the Hyper-V virtual switch to connect to. Optional.

guest_os.description: Guest operating system. Windows guests use PowerShell Direct; Linux guests use SSH. Default: "windows".

guest_user.description: Guest OS username for exec operations (PSRP auth for Windows; SSH user for Linux). Default: "Administrator" for Windows, "admin" for Linux.

guest_password.description: Guest OS password (PSRP password for Windows; SSH password for Linux).
